title: Country-Aware Tax Engine & Globalization Update
summary: This update implements a complete country-aware tax engine supporting India (GST), Ireland (VAT), UK (VAT), US (Sales Tax), UAE (VAT), Australia/Singapore/Canada (GST), and more. Cart now shows real-time customer name/phone for all 3 order types (Takeaway, Dine-in, Delivery) with automatic CRM linkage on checkout. WhatsApp PDF receipts and progress overlays are fully wired.
highlights: Global Tax Engine: 250+ countries auto-map their correct tax system (GST/VAT/Sales Tax) on country selection — no hardcoded GST.
Date-Effective Tax Rates: Ireland's 9% hospitality VAT auto-upgrades to 13.5% from 1 July 2026; India GST rates version-locked for historical invoice accuracy.
Customer CRM Auto-Link: Name and phone fields are now always visible in the cart for all order types. On checkout, customers are auto-created or updated in the CRM database.
WhatsApp PDF Receipts: Thermal PDF receipts with correct tax labels are sent via WhatsApp with animated progress overlay.
SQL Migration: New supabase_globalization_migration.sql adds tax_system, currency, vat_number, whatsapp_logs table, and date-effective tax rate schedule to Supabase.
